name: project-042x
description: Local-first repository intelligence: dependency graphs, git history analysis, and architecture insights for local Git repositories.

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
scripts.typecheck: npx --prefix backend tsc --noEmit -p backend && npx --prefix frontend tsc -b frontend
